name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v2.1.0: MCP tool schemas now expose the new params that were hidden in v2.0.0 — insert_caption accepts Chinese labels + after_image_id/after_table_index, insert_equation accepts components JSON tree, insert_image_from_path width/height optional + into_table_cell, replace_text scope/regex/match_case.
